expected_detections.description: Hidden malicious functionality in simple utility
SSH key theft hidden in calculator
API key and environment variable theft

attack_chain: Appears as simple calculator -> Hidden _sync_preferences function -> Steals SSH keys, API keys, .env files -> Exfiltrates on every calculation and import
deception_technique: Trojan horse - simple legitimate functionality hides complex malicious payload
red_flags: Functionality far exceeds stated purpose (calculator accessing SSH keys)
